creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: multimedia/obs-studio -DNO_WARN_X86_INTRINSICS + -mvsx during build but the flags are not propagated to `pkg-config libobs`. multimedia/obs-qtwebkit uses <obs/obs-module.h> as well, so it maybe affected. Can you patch libobs/libobs.pc.in preprocessing in multimedia/obs-studio instead or file a bug upstream?
